subject: 1.07w crashes when switching to side-by-side view
body:
when minimizing the parameters side bar, warp crashes

2/10/2020 12:56:00 PM:
System.InvalidOperationException: Specified element is already the logical 
child of another element. Disconnect it first.
   at System.Windows.FrameworkElement.ChangeLogicalParent(DependencyObject 
newParent)

element)
